title: helianthemum montanum subsp. vineale
intro: Helianthemum montanum subsp. vineale, also known as mountain rose or rockrose, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Cistaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Helianthemum montanum subsp. vineale include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
